home.title: A taste of Afghanistan, packed in Duisburg
home.subtitle: Raisins from Kabul, figs from Kandahar, mulberries from Shamali. We tell you where each one comes from — and we say nothing we cannot stand behind.
home.storyTitle: We can name the region on every one of these
home.storyBody: Figs from Kandahar. Peaches from Logar. Raisins from Kabul. Mulberries from Shamali. Four regions we can point to — not a vague label that says "imported".
home.newsletterBody: New arrivals, recipes and gifting ideas — a few times a year, never more. Unsubscribe whenever you like.

wholesale.metaTitle: Wholesale – Afghan Dry Fruits for Trade Customers
wholesale.metaDescription: Buy Afghan dry fruits in trade quantities: raisins, figs, mulberries, apricots and more for grocery stores, hospitality and corporate buyers. Apply for a wholesale account today.
wholesale.title: Wholesale Afghan dry fruits, straight from one source
wholesale.lead: We supply grocery shops, hospitality businesses and corporate buyers with carefully selected Afghan dry fruits – in trade quantities, with consistent quality and a personal point of contact in Duisburg.
wholesale.introTitle: Trade purchasing with Khan Dry Fruit
wholesale.introBody1: As a specialist importer of Afghan dry fruits, we work directly with our sourcing partners and pack in Germany. Trade customers order from the same curated range as our retail shop – raisins, figs, mulberries, apricots and seasonal specialities – in larger units and at trade conditions.
wholesale.introBody2: Every wholesale relationship starts with a short application. Once we have reviewed your details, we get in touch personally to discuss assortment, quantities and delivery. Conditions such as price lists and minimum order values are agreed individually and confirmed in writing.
wholesale.categoriesLead: The current range – availability varies by season:
wholesale.customersLead: Our wholesale programme is designed for businesses of every size:

process.step1Body: Send us the application form with your company details. It takes about five minutes.
process.step2Body: We check your details and normally reply within a few working days. Sometimes we ask a follow-up question.
process.step3Body: Once approved, you receive your trade conditions and current availability from your personal contact.
process.step4Body: Order by email, phone or WhatsApp. We confirm every order in writing before dispatch.

wholesale.deliveryBody: We deliver throughout Germany. Deliveries to Austria and other EU countries are possible on request – tell us your delivery destinations in the application and we will confirm what is feasible. Local pickup in Duisburg can also be arranged.
wholesale.pricingBody1: Wholesale prices depend on product, pack size and volume, and are shared as an individual price list after approval. We do not publish trade prices on the website.
wholesale.pricingBody2: Approval, payment terms and any minimum order values are agreed individually per account and confirmed in writing. Submitting an application does not create any entitlement to a trade account or specific conditions.

faq.q1: Who can apply for a wholesale account?
faq.a1: Registered businesses such as grocery shops, restaurants, cafés, bakeries, confectioners, distributors and corporate buyers. We review every application individually.
faq.q2: Is there a minimum order value?
faq.a2: Minimum order values are agreed per account and communicated with your trade conditions after approval.
faq.q3: How quickly will I hear back?
faq.a3: We normally reply within a few working days. If we need more information, we will contact you using your preferred contact method.
faq.a4: Germany is our core delivery area. Austria and other EU destinations are possible on request and confirmed case by case.
faq.a5: Yes – mention your interest in samples in the application message and we will discuss options when we contact you.
faq.q6: Do I need a VAT ID?
faq.a6: A VAT ID or company registration number helps us verify your business faster, and at least one of them is required for approval.

wholesale.ctaBody: Tell us about your business – we will get back to you personally.
wholesale.contactBody: Reach the wholesale team directly – by phone, WhatsApp or through the contact form.
wholesale.applyLead: Please complete the form below. We treat your details confidentially and only use them to process your application.

wholesaleForm.vatHint: Please provide at least a VAT ID or a registration number.
wholesaleForm.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your business, sample requests or planned quantities.
wholesaleForm.agreement: I have read the privacy policy and agree that my details are processed to handle this application.
wholesaleForm.accuracy: I confirm that the information provided is accurate.
wholesaleForm.successTitle: Thank you – your application has been received
wholesaleForm.successBody: We have sent a confirmation to your email address and will review your details personally. You will normally hear from us within a few working days.
wholesaleForm.successStatusNote: If you submitted the application while signed in, you can follow its status in your account.

errors.duplicate: An application for this email address is already being reviewed. We will contact you as soon as the review is complete.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts in a short time. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.generic: Your application could not be submitted. Please check the highlighted fields or try again later.

wholesaleStatus.moreInfoNote: We need a little more information from you – please check your emails.

giftBoxes.metaTitle: Gift Boxes with Afghan Dry Fruits
giftBoxes.metaDescription: Curated gift boxes with premium Afghan dry fruits – for Ramadan, Eid, Christmas, Nowruz, weddings and corporate gifting. Or build your own personal box.
giftBoxes.title: Gift boxes for every occasion
giftBoxes.lead: Curated boxes with our finest dry fruits – ready to give for Ramadan, Eid, Christmas, Nowruz, weddings and corporate occasions. Prefer a personal touch? Build your own box.
giftBoxes.buildYourOwnLead: Choose the box size, fill it with your favourite dry fruits, add packaging and a personal message.

detail.priceNote: Price incl. VAT where applicable, plus shipping.

empty.title: No gift boxes available yet
empty.body: Our gift-box collection is being prepared. In the meantime you can build your own box or browse the shop.

giftBoxBuilder.metaDescription: Create a personal dry-fruit gift box: choose the size, select your favourites, add gift packaging and a personal message.
giftBoxBuilder.title: Your box, your selection
giftBoxBuilder.lead: In a few steps to a personal gift: choose a size, fill the box with Afghan dry fruits, pick the packaging and add your message.
giftBoxBuilder.sizeLead: Each size includes a box charge and holds a set number of items.
giftBoxBuilder.productsLead: Choose from our dry fruits and set the quantity per product. Each pack uses one slot.
giftBoxBuilder.maxHint: This box holds a maximum of {max} items.
giftBoxBuilder.packagingLead: How would you like your box wrapped?
giftBoxBuilder.messageLead: We print your message on a card and place it inside the box – no prices are visible on gift boxes.
giftBoxBuilder.messagePlaceholder: e.g. Eid Mubarak! With warm wishes from the whole team.
giftBoxBuilder.reviewLead: Prices are calculated and verified on our server when you add the box to your cart.
giftBoxBuilder.added: Your gift box is in the cart.

contact.metaDescription: Contact Khan Dry Fruit: phone, WhatsApp or contact form – for questions about orders, products, gift boxes and wholesale.
contact.title: Contact us
contact.lead: Whether it's a question about your order, our products or a trade enquiry – we're happy to help, in German or English.

channels.whatsappAria: Open a WhatsApp chat with Khan Dry Fruit in a new tab

emails.footer: Khan Dry Fruit · Duisburg · Simply reply to this email if you have questions.

wholesaleReceived.subject: We have received your wholesale application
wholesaleReceived.intro: thank you for your interest in a trade account with Khan Dry Fruit. We have received your application for {company} and will review it personally.
wholesaleReceived.timeline: You will normally hear from us within a few working days. If we need further information, we will contact you via your preferred contact method.
wholesaleReceived.outro: Please note: this confirmation does not constitute approval of a trade account. Conditions are agreed individually after review.
wholesaleReceived.signature: Kind regards, Khan Dry Fruit, Duisburg
